economic_notes: Nation holds investments in multiple partnerships including Squiala Holdings LP (100%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP (14.3%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP (12.4%), Centre Creek LP (11%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11.1%), and Squiala Holdings GP Inc. (100%). All accounted for using modified equity method. Eagle Landing Development LP land lease generates deferred revenue of $14,746,815.
notes: Fiscal year 2022, not 2024. Six entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,629,128) plus other government revenue per segmented schedule ($1,412,876) = $5,042,004. OSR calculated as total revenue ($8,201,605) minus total government transfers ($5,042,004) = $3,159,601. Capital Projects segment includes amortization of $373,700 and Social Housing includes $113,907 amortization which corresponds to repayment of long-term debt in cash flow statement. Net book value of TCA per Schedule 1 is $10,203,965. Deferred revenue largely consists of Eagle Landing Development LP land lease at $14,746,815. Social expenses combined Social Programs ($372,018) and Social Development ($374,374) = $746,392.
